query:
SELECT 'Partner' as type, id, businessName, status, tier, referralCount, leadsCount FROM partners WHERE businessName IN ('Scoop Duke DFW', 'Green Thumb Lawn Care')
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Inbound Opp' as type, o.id, o.opportunityType, o.status, o.description, o.estimatedJobValue, NULL FROM opportunities o JOIN partners p ON o.receivingPartnerId = p.id WHERE p.businessName = 'Scoop Duke DFW'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Outbound Ref' as type, o.id, o.opportunityType, o.status, o.description, o.estimatedJobValue, o.referralCommissionAmount FROM opportunities o JOIN partners p ON o.sourcePartnerId = p.id WHERE p.businessName = 'Scoop Duke DFW'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Commission' as type, c.id, c.commissionType, c.description, c.amount, c.paid, NULL FROM commissions c JOIN partners p ON c.receivingPartnerId = p.id WHERE p.businessName = 'Scoop Duke DFW';
